queries.question: List the names of the dances, their origin culture, and their popularity scores, ranking them from most to least popular, where the scores range from 70 to 85
queries.sql: SELECT DanceName, Culture, Popularity FROM "DanceTable" WHERE Popularity BETWEEN 70 AND 85 ORDER BY Popularity DESC;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?dancename ?culture ?popularity WHERE {
  ?dancetable a :Dance .
  ?dancetable p:DanceName ?dancename .
  ?dancetable p:Culture ?culture .
  ?dancetable p:Popularity ?popularity .
  ?dancetable p:Popularity ?popularity_b .
  ?dancetable p:Popularity ?popularity_o .
  FILTER(?popularity_b >= 70 && ?popularity_b <= 85)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?popularity_o)

queries.question: Display the culture of dances with popularity above 80, along with their popularity value.
queries.sql: SELECT Culture, Popularity AS MostPopular FROM "DanceTable" DanceTable WHERE Popularity > 80;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?culture ?popularity WHERE {
  ?dancetable a :Dance .
  ?dancetable p:Culture ?culture .
  ?dancetable p:Popularity ?popularity .
  ?dancetable p:Popularity ?popularity_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?popularity_f) > 80)
}

queries.question: Display the culture and geographical area of dances with popularity above 80, along with their popularity value.
queries.sql: SELECT Culture, Geographical_Area, Popularity AS MostPopular FROM "DanceTable" DanceTable WHERE Popularity > 80;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?culture ?geographical_area ?popularity WHERE {
  ?dancetable a :Dance .
  ?dancetable p:Culture ?culture .
  ?dancetable p:Geographical_Area ?geographical_area .
  ?dancetable p:Popularity ?popularity .
  ?dancetable p:Popularity ?popularity_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?popularity_f) > 80)
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: List the names of the dances, their origins, and their popularity scores, ranking them from most to least popular, where the scores range from 70 to 85.
Display the origins of dances with popularity above 80 along with their popularity value.
